name: spec-driven-jp
description: Hybrid pipeline for spec-driven development with Japanese design documents + Figma. Wraps GitHub Spec Kit with a design-intake agent and a code-reviewer agent.
author: hoanghainh1188

external: GitHub Spec Kit (specify CLI) — install via `uvx --from git+https://github.com/github/spec-kit.git specify --help`
Figma MCP server (optional, for automatic Figma reading in design-intake)
